title: omphalogramma engleri
intro: Omphalogramma engleri is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Borneo and Malaysia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Omphalogramma engleri include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and boost the immune system. Omphalogramma engleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
